resources.string: Are you sure you want to exit?
You need to manually allow the application to use "read and write permissions" to use this feature
Please read Privacy Policy. Click"agree and continue" to accept the User Agreement

Welcome to use UseeEar.We will strictly comply with relevant laws, regulations and privacy policies to protect user information.It need your below authorities for basic operation and function application.Storage:Used for data synthesis picture or video preservation, and historical data display\10 · Get location information:Used for wifi fast connection and Wifi signal display If don't agree the above authorities, which may wifi connect failed. You can exit APP/ close authories from your phone settings
设置编码需重新播放才能生效，是否继续？
是否从上次停止的位置恢复播放？
Unselected files or more than 9 files
Video file sharing can only select this file
Are you sure to delete these files?

① Scan the QR code on the manual, or search "UseeEar" in "App Store" or "Google Play" to download and install the APP;\10 (2) Long press the power button for 3 seconds;\10 ③ Open the UseeEar App;\10 ④ Jump to the mobile phone Settings and select the WLAN interface to connect the product WIFI: UseeEar-XXXX;\10 ⑤ Go back to "UseeEar App" and click the house icon again to use it.
Wifi connected successfully on settings, but can't record video on APP

please disconnect the device wifi, then connect that wifi again, it would pop-up windows“use device wifi can't surf the internet, will you keep connection yes or not?" please choose"yes" to connect device wifi successfully
How to use and assembly accessories?
Please take threaded connection for earpick tips
It's normal that device get heat when use it

Device use the proper brightness of LED, in order to advoid exposure or dim, and it apply for temperature control which make camera part with 25°， the body of device with 32°all the time， so please don't worry about heat dissipation slightly

(Device Wifi ID reject connection)\10\10 please check the device Wifi ID was connected by other device, you can reboot device and try connect again.\10\10 There is no image from UseeEar App when Wifi connect successfully)\10\10 iOS system:\10 Please search for" UseeEar App" from your iphone setting, then discover its local network and open authority, you can get back App for Wifi reconnection.\10 Android:\10 Open device, then check device Wifi ID"UseeEar-xxxx" from your phone setting, please disconnect the previous connection, you can try connection again. It may pop-up window hint"Continue to use this WiFi/Do not switch wifi/Keep connected" when you connect device Wifi, please select"YES" it's available
APP Abnormal condition( fuzzy/ flash/ blank screen)
Uninstall APP, re-download and install APP, please use alcohol swab clean camera. If still not solved, you can contact service
please view the operation video before use
Click Connect to enter your mobile phone Settings, display device WiFi ID "UseeEarUseeEar-XXX", and click "Connect".
Click the house icon into viewfinder
Need to manually allow the app to use 'recording permission' to use this feature
The current device is occupied by another mobile phone. Do you want to continue the connection?
